changes: Fix locale collisions between bundled DLCs that broke moneytruck and gofast missions.
Restore the cartheft lockpick minigame and unlock the vehicle on success.
Restore the moneytruck place explosive and grab money minigames.
Requires lyre_bridge 2.1.1 or newer for the new bridge.skillcheck module.
Make sure to update lyre_bridge alongside this resource. The previous release was broken.
New Lyre Scripts structure: install and start lyre_bridge before this resource.
lyre_bridge is open source and is not included in Granted Assets ZIPs; download it here: https://github.com/lyrescripts/lyre_bridge
Illegal Missions now uses a base resource plus DLC mission modules from the new release package.
Keep the base script and enabled DLC modules updated together; do not mix old standalone mission folders with the new DLC structure.
Reconfigure from the new config files instead of copying the old config directly.
Add teamMembers argument on alertJob function
